Note that the Center for Medicaid and CHIP Services (CMCS) at CMS has required redaction of the 
MDCD_PD_AMT field for managed care claims due to the proprietary and confidential nature of this 
information. Therefore, this total does not reflect the redacted managed care expenditures. 
MMLEADS may count claims (in the MDCD_TOTAL_USE variable) for which there is no corresponding 
payment information.
